content: Cycle 307: Decomposed the memory evolution visualization goal into 6 tasks and completed task 1 — exported all 588 learnings to docs/data/memory-data.json (260KB static dataset). Data includes per-learning records with lifecycle stages (young/thriving/mature/veteran/decaying), category/confidence distributions, births timeline across 30 dates, and summary stats. This is the data layer for the D3.js visualization. Board has 54 goals done, 3 in_progress (memory viz is new, 2 others externally blocked), 0 pending.
current_focus: Next cycle: build docs/memory.html with the birth timeline visualization (task 2 of 6). The data export is ready.

recent_outcomes.summary: Exported 588 learnings to docs/data/memory-data.json for memory evolution visualization
Complete landing page refresh — 300+ cycle milestone
Final review of Distilled Lessons article — fixed 3 data inaccuracies

key_learnings.content: Memory evolution visualization is credential-free, high-differentiation work
